data.label: Suspicious
data.explanation: Teh, hello lang? Walang claim, walang chismis. Parang nag-hi lang talaga. Baka nagkamali ng send?

data.summary: Sis, walang fact dito, opinion lang! Dapat hanapan natin ng matibay na basehan bago paniwalaan.
data.tip: Next time, mhie, hanapin yung 'sino, ano, saan, kailan' para mas sure na hindi tayo nagpapaniwala sa haka-haka lang!

data.details: May mga questionable parts — double check muna bago i-share.

harmScore.explanation: This content has unclear or unverified claims. Verify before sharing.

data.maritesMode: Teh, hello lang? Walang claim, walang chismis. Parang nag-hi lang talaga. Baka nagkamali ng send?

resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Sis, walang fact dito, opinion lang! Dapat hanapan natin ng matibay na basehan bago paniwalaan.

points.issue: Walang specific details or facts na binibigay yung claim, puro general idea lang.
points.correction: Ang factual claim dapat may concrete details like numbers, dates, or names para ma-verify.

points.issue: Teh, walang source na binanggit, kaya di natin alam kung saan galing yung info.
points.correction: Dapat may credible source lagi para masigurado natin na reliable yung claim, like reputable news sites or expert opinions.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, mhie, hanapin yung 'sino, ano, saan, kailan' para mas sure na hindi tayo nagpapaniwala sa haka-haka lang!
